instruction: Final verification of Phase 3 Frontend: 1) Verify all files exist: frontend/package.json, frontend/vite.config.js, frontend/index.html, frontend/src/main.js, frontend/src/App.js, frontend/src/api/index.js, frontend/src/components/Login.js, frontend/src/components/Register.js, frontend/src/components/UserProfile.js, frontend/src/components/Logout.js. 2) Verify backend/routes/auth.js uses process.env.JWT_SECRET and has actual pool.query DB calls instead of commented User model code. 3) Verify frontend Login.js uses apiClient, email field, and navigate('/profile') on success. 4) Verify Logout.js clears token and redirects. No changes needed if all correct.
